project_type: AWS CDK (Java) sleep audio processing pipeline - AI-driven TDD experiment
build_system: Maven 3.9+ with NODE_OPTIONS clearing for jsii compatibility
test_framework: JUnit 5 + CDK Assertions (15 test files, 112 assertions)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' to ensure all 112 CDK assertion tests pass. 2. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' to verify CloudFormation synthesis. Documentation-only changes should not affect these.
setup_instructions: Java 17 via mise, Maven 3.9+, Node.js 20+. Run 'mvn compile' then 'mvn test'.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can pull from Maven Central. No Docker daemon needed. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for CDK commands.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, TDD-first workflow, architecture sync required for structural changes. CONTRIBUTING.md has full details.
key_patterns: README already has 4 badges (CI, CDK Version, Java, License), Mermaid flowchart LR diagram, experiment methodology section, links to ARCHITECTURE.md and EXPERIMENT.md. FINAL-REPORT.md has quantitative metrics (112 assertions, 15 test files, 10 AWS services, 14 issues, 17 days). EXPERIMENT.md has full methodology and 5x3 matrix description.
directory_structure: src/main/java/com/myorg/ (CDK stacks), src/main/resources/lambda/ (Python Lambda), src/test/java/com/myorg/ (15 test files), .github/workflows/ci.yml (CI)
